fixture_notice: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN — NON-EVIDENTIARY — NOT A PRODUCTION REGISTRATION
name: SYNTHETIC-DRY-RUN tiny propositional formal-system fixture
definition: A deliberately tiny two-valued propositional system over atoms A and B with the sole theory assumption A. It exists only to exercise serialization of the FORMAL_ANALYSIS contract.
boundary: This fixture is not FMO-0.1, is not a model of cognition or memory behavior, and cannot establish formal correctness, scientific validity, mechanism performance, or production readiness.
